topOfMind.summary: User is currently engaged in recruiting and talent evaluation. The immediate task was to analyze resumes (崔亚飞 and 杨佳文) for a Java backend development role and generate a comparative report. The user is comparing candidates with 8 years and 5 years of experience, spanning senior architect and mid-to-senior developer levels, with salary expectations of 45K-55K/month and 25K-30K/month respectively. The analysis covered technical stack, project complexity, and industry background.

facts.content: User is evaluating two Java backend candidates: 崔亚飞 (8 years experience, senior engineer/architect, salary 45K-55K/month) and 杨佳文 (5 years experience, mid-to-senior developer, salary 25K-30K/month).
User requested a comparative resume analysis report, indicating interest in talent recruitment evaluation.
